overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a rainy urban residential area in Los Santos, passing apartment buildings and vehicles before encountering a fleeing pedestrian at a bus stop and reaching an intersection with a distinctive castle-like building.

events.description: Black sedan passes by on the wet road to the left
Red sports car drives past on the road creating water spray

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill on the wet sidewalk alongside the busy road

notable_agents.action: Black sedan driving past on the wet road with headlights on
Red sports car speeding down the road creating water spray

entered.detail: Multi-story residential building with balconies and beige facade
Concrete retaining wall topped with dense green hedges
Rain-soaked asphalt with reflections and puddles
Tall palm trees visible in the distance along the road
Ornate black street lamp post with glowing light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk down a rainy residential sidewalk with a modern apartment building and hedge wall on the right. Vehicles including a black sedan and red sports car pass by on the wet road to the left, while palm trees and street lights line the avenue ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop area with view of historic church

events.description: Bus stop shelter comes into view on the right sidewalk ahead
Historic church with twin towers becomes clearly visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: approaching a bus stop while observing traffic and the church ahead

notable_agents.action: Person in blue shirt sitting on the bus stop bench waiting
Blue sedan driving through the wet intersection ahead

entered.detail: Glass and metal bus shelter with red advertisement poster
Historic Spanish-style church with twin towers and red tile roof
White regulatory sign reading 'DO NOT BLOCK' with arrow

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a bus stop shelter on the right where a person is sitting on the bench. A historic church with distinctive towers becomes visible ahead, while traffic including a blue sedan moves through the wet intersection. The initial apartment building passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with historic castle landmark

events.description: Person at bus stop suddenly stands up and runs away from the camera into the street
Camera reaches the intersection revealing the large castle-like building across the street

agents.ego_description: reaching the intersection and pausing to observe traffic, watching a pedestrian flee the bus stop

notable_agents.action: Person suddenly standing up from bench and running away across the sidewalk
Black SUV waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: Large stone castle-like structure with crenellated walls and multiple towers
Wide road intersection with crosswalk markings and puddles
Traffic light pole with red signals illuminated

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the intersection where the pedestrian suddenly flees the bus stop and runs away. A prominent castle-like stone building becomes visible across the intersection, while vehicles including a black SUV wait at the traffic lights. The scene opens up to a wider urban junction with multiple traffic signals and crosswalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy residential neighborhood that gradually opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by historic architecture. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a modern apartment building and hedge wall, moving past a black sedan and red sports car on the glistening road. As the camera advances, the apartment building recedes and the view expands to reveal a bus stop shelter and the distant towers of a historic church. The scene then shifts toward a busy junction where a pedestrian suddenly flees from the bus stop, while the perspective opens up to a wider intersection filled with traffic signals and waiting vehicles. Finally, the movement culminates at the crosswalk, bringing a prominent castle-like stone building into full view across the street.
